name: clipboard-image-to-photoshop
title: Clipboard Image to Photoshop
description: Opens the current image on the clipboard in Adobe Photoshop
author: miguelcaetanodias

commands.name: open-in-photoshop
commands.title: Open Clipboard Image in Photoshop
commands.description: Opens the current image on the clipboard in Adobe Photoshop

preferences.name: photoshopApp
preferences.title: Photoshop Application
preferences.description: Override the target app. Leave empty to auto-detect the latest installed version. Accepts an app name (e.g. "Adobe Photoshop 2025") or a full path (e.g. "/Applications/Adobe Photoshop 2025/Adobe Photoshop 2025.app").
